author: sleepyhauru
install_msg: Thanks for installing the Custom Commands Menu! Use `[p]commands` to view the embedded command list.
name: commands
short: Embedded command list for selected cogs.
description: Provides a single embedded command menu showing categorized commands for specific installed cogs such as EmojiSteal, Deepfry, AddImage, and Birthday. Designed as a cleaner alternative to the default help command for servers.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
